items.author: Anthony Franco

items.title: Family sighs: Boyd, hurt with kids, has surgery
items.summary: Matthew Boyd underwent successful surgery on his left meniscus -- an injury suffered while playing with his kids -- and is set to miss at least a month, according to manager Craig Counsell.
items.author: Jesse Rogers

items.title: Copy of Yanks' Domínguez exits after crashing into wall
items.summary: Jasson Domínguez is headed to the IL with a sprained shoulder after crashing into the outfield wall, opening a path for prospect Spencer Jones to make his debut.
items.author: Jorge Castillo

items.title: Red Sox opting to place Anthony (wrist) on IL
items.summary: The Boston Red Sox placed Roman Anthony on the 10-day injured list, making the decision Thursday after the second-year outfielder's wrist hadn't improved much since he injured it earlier this week.

items.title: Royals say Ragans dealing with pitcher's elbow
items.summary: Royals left-hander Cole Ragans has been diagnosed with valgus extension overload, otherwise known as pitcher's elbow, after leaving his start against the Cleveland Guardians on Wednesday.

items.title: Reds' Lowder exits start with shoulder discomfort
items.summary: Cincinnati Reds pitcher Rhett Lowder has exited his start against the Chicago Cubs in the bottom of the fourth inning with right shoulder discomfort.

items.title: Dodgers' Betts set to begin rehab stint Friday
items.summary: Mookie Betts is set to begin a rehab assignment Friday for the Dodgers' Triple-A affiliate, putting him on track to return to the big league team next week.

items.title: Padres put Campusano (toe) on IL, recall Durán
items.summary: Padres catcher Luis Campusano has been placed on the 10-day injured list with a broken left toe, and 28-year-old Rodolfo Durán has been called up to make his major league debut.

items.title: Tigers' Valdez gets 6-game ban for plunking Story
items.summary: Detroit's Framber Valdez was suspended five games by MLB for intentionally throwing at Boston's Trevor Story, while Tigers manager A.J. Hinch got a one-game ban.

items.title: ⚾ Looking back: Kerry Wood's masterful 20-K day
items.summary: Wood, Hall of Famer Craig Biggio and others look back to when the Cubs phenom owned the zone and tied the single-game strikeout record.

items.summary: A nightmare season continues for Carlos Estévez. Anne Rogers of MLB.com reports that the Royals’ closer suffered a rotator cuff strain and will be shut down from throwing for three weeks. He’ll be reevaluated at the end of May. Estévez has been out of action since Opening Day. He
items.author: Anthony Franco

items.author: Darragh McDonald
